blocks.text: Tough day (-25.9) — specific-location lottery misses (Australia→Perth, Sudan→South Kordofan, Gaza children→Jordan, Greek→Trikala), all bounded losses; tariff→South Korea (in list) +14.7. TW **1031.07**. These obscure-location questions are inherently hard; my spreads cap the damage. Overall trajectory still strong. Advancing efficiently — next deep-dives at Grammys (Feb 1), Super Bowl (Feb 8), Winter Olympics (Feb 6+).
